name: Blacksky
description: Blacksky community as represented inside the idiolect framework. Blacksky publishes its own ATProto lexicons under community.blacksky.{feed,assembly}.* and runs an AppView that hosts community-scoped feed records. This idiolect record makes Blacksky a first-class participant in the idiolect catalog: dialect preferences, role assignments, and translation lenses all hang off this AT-URI.
